# `setuppy` (python ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Hand-written prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly uses this chain when it finds `setuppy` evidence.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `setuppy` |
| Ecosystem | `python` |
| Detector chain | `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `setup.py` |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `syft for bomly-lite` |
